---
title: "Showcased projects and work"
---

* <a href="projects/beer_can.qmd" class="highlight">Measuring X-ray spectra with a beer can</a>
* Higgs to diphoton mock statistical analysis
* <a href="projects/xbb.qmd" class="highlight">Calibration of $X \to b\bar{b}$ tagging efficiency in CMS scouting data</a>
* Simulating fluids on the terminal
* Seminar on Experimental Foundations of Particle Physics
